name: @firstpick/pi-skill-competitor-analysis
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill when comparing competing products, services, libraries, tools, vendors, or approaches for market/product positioning, feature matrices, strategic trade-offs, pricing, adoption, or differentiation.
description_zh: 代理在比较竞争产品、服务、库、工具、供应商或方法以进行市场/产品定位、功能矩阵、战略权衡、定价、采用或差异化时应调用此技能
